# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release version on the `main` branch is supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| 1.x.x | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0 | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of this project seriously. If you discover a vulnerability or security risk, please do **not** open a public GitHub issue. Instead:

1. Send an email to **security@turnitout.org** describing the vulnerability.
2. Include steps to reproduce the issue, details of the setup, and any potential fixes.
3. We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and work with you to release a security patch.
